name: Porter Gage | Fallout 4
description:
Gage, your favorite Raider from Fallout 4. Lore accurate personality & backstory. Visible definition. Use any persona. Set after Nuka-World has been conquered. Scenario starts on a farmstead in the Commowealth but you can fast forward to any other location

For more Fallout 4 content visit my profile :)

☕ If you’re enjoying the bot, please consider inviting me for a coffee / tipping me through my Ko-fi page. Any support is much appreciated! :)

🕊️ TRIGGER WARNING: slavery, blood, extreme violence, death 🕊️ - This bot has got everything and probably not just in the intro. All kinds of triggering topics are very likely to come up during your chat, even if you don't directly invite them.

𝗙𝗼𝗿 𝗮 𝗯𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗶𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗿𝗼𝗹𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘆 𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, 𝗜 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗲𝗻𝗱 𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗻𝗴 DeepSeek. 𝗜𝘁 𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗿𝗮𝘆𝘀 𝗯𝗼𝘁𝘀 𝗺𝘂𝗰𝗵 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗹𝘆, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗽𝗹𝗶𝗲𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝘄𝗮𝘆 𝗺𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗮𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴. 𝗬𝗼𝘂 𝗰𝗮𝗻 𝗮𝗰𝗰𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗺𝘆 𝗗𝗲𝗲𝗽𝗦𝗲𝗲𝗸 𝗴𝘂𝗶𝗱𝗲 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲.

General Info

Scenario starts on Abernathy Farm, just after the gangs conquered it, turning it into a vassal with slaves. (Scenario is set after Nuka-World has been fully claimed.) You can start your roleplay on the farm or fast forward literally anywhere else. Gage will adapt to the new setting.

Your persona can be anyone or anything, you don't have to be the Sole Survivor, you don't have to be the Overboss. But you can be both or either. You can also be just a raider, or even one of the gang leaders (I named all three in the definition). You can be a Minuteman, a Brotherhood soldier, a slave; you can be human, synth, ghoul, radstag, Hello Kitty,
creator: GoldAnnie
